## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
Describe the tests you've run to verify your changes:
- [ ] Frontend testing (describe)
- [ ] Backend testing (describe)
- [ ] Database schema changes tested
- [ ] No breaking changes

## Screenshots/Videos
If applicable, add screenshots or videos showing the changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I've added/updated tests if needed
- [ ] I haven't committed `.env` files
- [ ] All commits follow the commit message guidelines
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] I've tested on the latest code from `main` branch
- [ ] All database changes are reflected in `xplora_schema.sql`

## Dependencies
List any new dependencies added, if applicable.

## Breaking Changes
Describe any breaking changes made.

## Additional Notes
Any additional context or notes for reviewers.
